name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual bookkeeping causes cash flow gaps. We automate bookkeeping instead of manual bookkeeping and spreadsheet management.
problem_solved: Manual bookkeeping processes lead to errors and inefficiencies.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual bookkeeping processes lead to errors and inefficiencies.
